stance: Risk-on within the digital theme: rotate from rolled-over IT-services into digital-infrastructure, exchanges/fintech and digital-platform winners with rising analyst revisions.
experience_note: First graded round (last_round_review is null), so nothing to grade yet; I am pre-registering theses for honest scoring. What I am watching: (1) whether the rising-revision IT-services holds (Coforge, Hexaware, TCS, Tech Mahindra) convert improving revisions into price over 1-2 quarters — if price momentum stays negative AND revisions roll over too, I cut them next round; (2) whether the digital-infra momentum leaders (STLTECH especially, z_mom extreme) are a durable up-cycle or a crowded blow-off — a sharp momentum reversal with revisions fading would falsify; (3) whether my deliberate underweight to the high-momentum off-theme industrials (vs the quant baseline) costs me active return — if those names keep leading and my digital tilt lags the NIFTY 500, I will revisit how much theme purity is worth. I would change my mind on the IT-services holds if the next revision print turns down while price stays weak, and on the digital-infra adds if momentum reverses hard on falling revisions.
